items.headline: Jesper Wallstedt 'more prepared' for Minnesota Wild in Game 3 win
items.description:
ST. PAUL, Minn. -- Four nights ago in Denver, Jesper Wallstedt was sitting on the end of the visitors bench, his hat on his head, watching Game 2 of the Western Conference Second Round.
Only Wallstedt, the Minnesota Wild's 23-year-old goalie, didn't look at it as a benching even though

items.headline: Minnesota Wild reclaim their game in Game 3 against Avalanche
items.description: ST. PAUL, Minn. -- It started early, the Minnesota Wild on their game, skating well, playing physical, finding space, defending hard, and getting help with flashes of brilliance from goalie Jesper Wallstedt.

items.headline: Colorado Avalanche Minnesota Wild Game 3 recap May 9 2026
items.description: ST. PAUL, Minn. -- Kirill Kaprizov had a goal and two assists for the Minnesota Wild, who defeated the Colorado Avalanche 5-1 in Game 3 of the Western Conference Second Round at Grand Casino Arena on Saturday.

items.headline: Philadelphia Flyers thankful for fans’ support after elimination
items.description:
PHILADELPHIA -- The chants and cheers from the fans that packed Xfinity Mobile Arena echoed long after the Philadelphia Flyers finished shaking hands with the victorious Carolina Hurricanes following the end of their four-game loss in the Eastern Conference Second Round series.
They were cheers Rick Tocchet was familiar with

items.headline: Sean Walker whirlwind trip brings him back to Hurricanes after baby’s arrival
items.description: PHILADELPHIA -- Sean Walker is looking forward to having the next two days off.

items.headline: Hurricanes eager to take the next step after returning to Eastern Final
items.description:
PHILADELPHIA -- There was plenty to celebrate in the joyous Carolina Hurricanes locker room following their 3-2 overtime victory against the Philadelphia Flyers in Game 4 of the Eastern Conference Second Round at Xfinity Mobile Arena on Saturday.
That’s what comes with being the first team to sweep its first

items.headline: Carolina Hurricanes Philadelphia Flyers game 4 recap May 9 2026
items.description: PHILADELPHIA -- Jackson Blake scored at 5:31 of overtime, and the Carolina Hurricanes defeated the Philadelphia Flyers 3-2 to complete the Eastern Conference Second Round best-of-7 series sweep at Xfinity Mobile Arena on Saturday.

items.headline: 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs second round schedule television results
items.description: The second round of the 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs began Saturday with the Carolina Hurricanes defeating the Philadelphia Flyers 3-0. The second round continued on Sunday with the Colorado Avalanche defeating the Minnesota Wild 9-6.

items.headline: Celebrities sports stars attend NHL Stanley Cup Playoffs
items.description:
The puck has dropped on the 2026 Stanley Cup playoffs. Celebrities from the sports and entertainment worlds are taking in all the action. Check out what famous faces have been spotted in the stands.

items.description:
NEW YORK – The National Hockey League today announced start times and national broadcast information for Games 4 through 6 of the 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs Second Round series between the Colorado Avalanche and Minnesota Wild. The updated series schedule is as follows:

items.headline: Carolina Hurricanes Buffalo Sabres Montreal Canadiens 2026 playoff lookahead
items.description:
The Carolina Hurricanes will play the Buffalo Sabres or Montreal Canadiens in the Eastern Conference Final.

items.headline: PK Subban Montreal Childrens Hospital donation
items.description:
P.K. now officially stands for promise kept.
ESPN NHL analyst and former Norris Trophy winner P.K. Subban completed his over decade-long, $10-million donation project to Montreal Children's Hospital, the hospital's foundation announced on Friday.

items.headline: William Karlsson boosting Golden Knights on and off the ice
items.description:
ANAHEIM -- William Karlsson was addressing the media prior to the biggest game of the season for the Vegas Golden Knights on Friday morning, but the forward had difficulty keeping a straight face with teammate Keegan Kolesar staring him down from the adjacent stall.

items.headline: Anaheim Ducks Mason McTavish Lukas Dostal in lineup for Game 4
items.description:
IRVINE, Calif. -- Mason McTavish will return to the lineup for the Anaheim Ducks against the Vegas Golden Knights in Game 4 of the Western Conference Second Round at Honda Center on Sunday (9:30 p.m. ET; ESPN, SN360, SN, TVAS).

items.headline: Anaheim Ducks youth leaning on veterans during playoff run
items.description: ANAHEIM -- Among the 18 Anaheim Ducks skaters who played in Game 3 of Western Conference Second Round on Friday, there were a combined 559 postseason games of experience prior to this season.
